issues.description: Independent test verification failed: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'tiktoken'. The test suite at tests/unit/test_assembly.py could not be collected because tiktoken is not installed in the test environment.
issues.requirement: All acceptance criteria - cannot verify without working tests
issues.suggestion: Add tiktoken to requirements.txt or pyproject.toml dependencies. The implementation imports tiktoken in src/fleet_memory/retrieval/assembly.py but the dependency is not declared in the project configuration.
